summary: Patient Approval System feature fully tested and verified. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend E2E tests passed. The feature correctly implements: participant adds patient -> pending status, organizer adds patient -> auto-approved, organizer can approve pending patients, UI shows badges and approve button correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing toast import in MeetingDetailPage.js - added 'import { toast } from '@/components/ui/sonner'
seed_data_creation: Test users and patients with 'TEST_', 'E2E_' prefixes created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Patient approval system is fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/meetings/{id}/patients (returns approval_status), POST /api/meetings/{id}/patients/{patient_id}/approve. Email notifications are sent when participant adds patient (to organizer) and when organizer approves (to participant who added).

participant_adds_patient_pending.description: When participant adds patient, status is 'pending'

api_response.message: Patient added to meeting. Awaiting organizer approval.

organizer_adds_patient_auto_approved.description: When organizer adds patient, status is auto-approved

patient_card_pending_badge.description: Patient card shows 'Pending Approval' badge for pending patients

patient_card_approved_by.description: Patient card shows 'Approved by' name for approved patients

organizer_approve_button.description: Organizer sees 'Approve Patient' button for pending patients only
organizer_approve_button.ui_element: Green button with '✓ Approve Patient' text

approve_button_works.description: Approve button changes status from pending to approved

tab_badge_pending_count.description: Tab badge shows count of pending patients (organizer only)
tab_badge_pending_count.ui_element: Badge showing '1 Pending' on Patients tab

email_to_organizer.description: Email notification sent to organizer when participant adds patient

email_to_participant.description: Email notification sent to participant when organizer approves
